content:
# Trace Metal

**Summary**: Naturally occurring metallic elements or elements with metallic properties found in small concentrations.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2019-alotaibi|Alotaibi, 2019]] quantified trace metal levels in PM10 samples.

## Scientific Context

- [[2019-alotaibi|Alotaibi, 2019]] Trace metals are indicators of industrial and anthropogenic pollution.

## Measurement and Characterization Methods

- [[2019-alotaibi|Alotaibi, 2019]] Quantified using X-Ray Fluorescence (XRF).

## Key Findings Across Sources

- Concentrations of heavy metals were measured to assess the impact of industrial activity on air quality. ([[2019-alotaibi|Alotaibi, 2019, p. 144]])
